name: @forgesworn/bark
description: Heartwood-aware NIP-07 browser extension. Signs through your Heartwood device via NIP-46.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:chromium && npm run build:firefox && npm run build:safari
scripts.e2e:deterministic: npm run build:chromium && playwright test e2e/nip46-relay-signer.spec.js
scripts.e2e:approval: npm run build:chromium && playwright test e2e/approval-popup.spec.js
scripts.e2e:live: npm run build:chromium && playwright test e2e/live-relay-signer.spec.js
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build:all && npm audit
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run e2e:chromium
scripts.package:all: npm run package:chromium && npm run package:firefox && npm run package:safari
